content.en:
In the following days, Ye Tian focused his main energy on cultivating the third set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Techniques and creating the Chaos Divine Codex Secret Technique, and as for the other aspects, he could improve them occasionally.

The third set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Techniques requires a long period of cultivation and time accumulation, so you can't be impatient.

However, now Ye Tian is almost about to cultivate the third set of movements to the consummation realm, and he can continue to cultivate the fourth set of movements at the god-level level.

Once the fourth set of movements was practiced, he couldn't imagine what level of Ye Tian's physical strength would reach.

Time flies, and six years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian successfully practiced the third set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Techniques to the perfection realm, and the strength of his physical body increased greatly, and his strength also skyrocketed.

And Ye Tian was surprised to find that with the completion of the third set of movements, he also made full progress in terms of immortal power, and it was easier for him to compress immortal power.

"Eight times the immortal power! Yes, if it goes on like this, it won't be far from compressing the immortal power to ten times!"

Ye Tian said with satisfaction.

this day.

A piece of news came.

"Zhou Tian, that kid has become the son of the universe!"

Ye Tian was not surprised by this at all, with Zhou Tian's sword dao attainments, coupled with the cultivation environment of the supreme hall of the human race, it was not difficult to become a son of the universe at all.

"It's the first apprentice, let's go meet it!"

Ye Tian got up and headed to the yellow-level area.

Ordinary highnesses are not allowed to cross regions, but Ye Tian is different, his status is very different, and his authority is very high, even higher than the authority of his heavenly highness in some aspects.

As a result, he can freely enter and exit the yellow-level area and the Xuan-level area.

......

Yellow area.

Zhou Tiangang, under the advice of the illusory elf butler, passed the assessment of a cultivation tower with a medium cultivation environment and successfully settled in this cultivation tower.

"I have finally entered the yellow-level area of the supreme hall of the human race, the master is in the Xuan-level area, as long as I work hard to cultivate, even if I can't catch up with the master's combat power, at least I hope to be in the same area as the master. Zhou Tian said secretly in his heart.

Suddenly.

A voice came from outside.

"Sunday!"

This voice was extremely familiar, and Zhou Tian hurriedly walked out of the cultivation tower.

"Master!"

Zhou Tian exclaimed in surprise, and immediately came to Ye Tian and made a disciple salute.

Immediately, he said, "Master, please come in!"

Ye Tian smiled and nodded, and followed Zhou Tian into his cultivation tower.

The hall on the first floor of the cultivation tower.

Ye Tian sat on the top, and Zhou Tian sat on the side.

"Master, I thought I would have to enter the Xuan-level area before I could expect to see you, but I didn't expect you to come over so soon!"

Zhou Tian was surprised.

"You are my apprentice after all, and when I heard that you had become a child of the universe, I came to see you. Originally, when you were in the Nine Star Heavenly Glory, I could also come over and have a look, but thinking that this would affect your cultivation in the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, I didn't plan to go over. Ye Tian said lightly.

Zhou Tian nodded slightly, understanding Ye Tian's approach.

The two chatted for a while.

Suddenly, Ye Tian said: "Zhou Tian, it is estimated that it will not be long before you will inherit the divine canon of the supreme hall of the human race, the divine canon is an extremely important inheritance for the human race, and it is also an indispensable means for the children of the universe to improve their strength when they are at the emperor level." I originally chose the Chaos Body Refining Technique, the strongest supreme god of the human race. But I don't want you to choose this canon, because it requires cultivators to inevitably gather twelve basic attribute god-level talents in order to have any hope of cultivating the Chaos Body Refining Technique to the consummation realm, and only one or two of your basic attribute talents have reached the god level, which is far from the standard at all, and you can't even get started. Therefore, this supreme canon is not suitable for you, I suggest you choose that Dao supreme canon, second only to the Chaos Supreme Canon, and it is also the most suitable path for you. Of course, the cultivation of the Supreme Divine Code is very difficult, and ordinary highnesses don't dare to choose it at all, but I believe in you!"

"Master, I understand!"

Zhou Tian nodded.

Then, Ye Tian explained some things and asked Zhou Tian to take as few detours as possible.

As for secret methods, treasures, or whatever, Ye Tian didn't give them.

For the children of the universe, external objects are basically not so important, and improving one's own strength is the most important thing.

And Ye Tian couldn't give Zhou Tian much help, after all, the two took different routes, and forcibly helping Zhou Tian would only change his path, which was not a good thing for Zhou Tian.

Ye Tian stayed here for a few hours before leaving here and returning to the Xuan-level area.

......

Ye Tian is now the most precious and demonic genius of the human race, and the human race will naturally not ignore Ye Tian, coupled with Ye Tian's contribution to the human race, so some opportunities that are of great benefit to Ye Tian, the supreme hall of the human race naturally thought of Ye Tian for the first time.

So, on this day, several supreme beings of the human race began to discuss on a big opportunity, which involved Ye Tian.

The supreme temple of the Terrans, somewhere in a mysterious hall.

The Kunwu Supreme, the Absolute Spell Supreme, and the Blue Emperor Supreme, the three supremes who resided in the supreme hall of the human race, were all present, and the incarnations of the other supremes also came here.

At this time, eight of the twelve supremes came, and more than a dozen ordinary supremes came.

So many supremes came at once, just because of one thing.

"The Heavenly Dao Fragment World is about to open, according to the rules of the past, each of the nine supreme forces has two places, and the Terran Supreme Hall has a total of six places, and these places must be given to His Highness above the True God level. In addition, there are three places for certain Scattered Cultivators to bid on. The previous sessions have been arranged like this for many times, but the Kunwu Supreme seems to have some opinions, I don't know if that's the case?"

The person who opened his mouth was one of the supremes of the Infinite Sword Sect, the Infinite Supreme, and the one who founded the Infinite Sword Sect, ranking as one of the twelve supremes.

Only one of the twelve supremes dares to speak like this, otherwise where would ordinary supremes dare to say this, they are not afraid of offending Kunwu Supreme!

Kunwu Supreme stared at Wuji Supreme and said in a deep voice: "Yes, it was such a rule in the past, but now it is different. I suggest a place for the Ten Thousand Laws of the Supreme Hall of our Terran Race, and I think he deserves it!"

The Divine Blade Supreme of the Divine Blade Alliance frowned and said, "Kunwu Supreme, His Highness Wanfa's cultivation is only god-level, and it does not meet the standard. We can't break the rules for the sake of His Highness Wanfa, right?"

"That's right, His Highness Wanfa is only at the god level, this is not in accordance with the rules!"

"If you break the rules for the sake of His Highness Wanfa this time, won't he break the rules for other Highnesses or the Inheritance Daozi next time, then what's the use of these rules?"

One supreme took the opportunity to refute, so many supremes refuted, and they were not afraid of offending Kunwu Supreme.

Seeing that many supremes were opposed, Kunwu Supreme still insisted: "Everyone, don't forget, His Highness Wanfa has contributed a variety of inheritances and treasures to the human race, and even the strongest supreme treasure has been contributed, and he has also contributed to the immortal inheritance, and you have also transformed the divine body, divine soul and divine power into immortal body, immortal soul and immortal power, their respective strengths have increased a little, and more importantly, the overall strength of the nine supreme level forces has increased a lot, and even doubled the strength of the entire human race." As long as it continues to develop, it will not be a problem for the human race to catch up with and surpass the Protoss, and it is even expected to surpass the Protoss. Isn't this kind of contribution not enough for a place?"

The other Supremes were silent, and Wuji Supreme said: "Kunwu Supreme, His Highness Wanfa's contribution is indeed very high, but it can't be said that if the contribution is high, you must give him a quota, right?

"Fair?" Kunwu Supreme sneered, "Is the potential of other highnesses as high as that of His Highness the Ten Thousand Laws?" I can even say that all the highnesses of the Supreme Hall of the entire Human Race together are not as good as one Highness of the Ten Thousand Laws, if there is a Supreme Highness of the God Race, they will definitely work hard to cultivate, but when it comes to our Human Race, they don't even have any preferential treatment?"

"His Royal Highness the Supreme Level?" Wuji Supreme Pupil shrank, "Supreme Kunwu, what do you mean? His Royal Highness Wanfa has become a Supreme Highness? Hasn't he just become a god-level not long ago, although it was rumored not long ago that he has the strength of the invincible Henggu-level Highness, but His Henggu-level Highness and the Supreme level are a huge threshold!"

The Kunwu Supreme was silent for a while, and then said openly: "Okay, let me tell you, in fact, His Royal Highness Wanfa hit the supreme level when he was at the emperor level, and now he is back at the supreme level at the god level." This is a true thing, he broke through the tenth floor of the battle tower not long ago!"

"Emperor Supreme Level, this ......"

Some Supremes thought for a moment and thought of a possibility.

The Divine Blade Supreme was stunned and said, "Kunwu Supreme, didn't His Highness Wanfa go to the Abyss of Destruction, and you took him there?"

"That's good!" Kunwu Supreme nodded, "It was I who took him to the Abyss of Destruction, and he easily broke the shackles and achieved His Royal Highness." In addition, he also cultivated the Chaos Body Refining Technique to the consummation realm, and obtained the Eighteen Golden Body Recipe inheritance, and practiced the Eighteen Golden Body Technique, even if he became a god, he could still continuously improve the strength and strength of his physical body. Coupled with his talent, he definitely has a chance to survive the thunderstorms. Everyone, I can't guarantee whether Ye Tian can transcend the universe, but once he becomes the supreme, he will be the most powerful supreme, and he can even be described as the supreme supreme. The human race needs a supreme supreme, otherwise, no matter how many ordinary supremes and supremes like us can compete with the protoss?"

At this time, even the Infinite Supreme and the Divine Blade Supreme were silent.

What Kunwu Supreme said is very realistic, the Protoss is too powerful, after all, there are many Supremes, and the Supreme is also very powerful, the strength of the First Divine Lord of the Protoss is too terrifying, ordinary Supremes will definitely be killed in seconds when they encounter the First Divine Master, and even a powerful Supreme like Kunwu Supreme can't stop the First Divine Lord from making a few moves.

If the Protoss wants to destroy the Terrans, it is very simple.

It's just that the Protoss is restrained by the demons, and the other cosmic clans will not sit idly by and watch the Protoss send troops to other cosmic clans.

If the Terrans are content with the status quo, then there is no need to worry about the Protoss for the time being.

But if the human race wants to be truly comparable to the Protoss, there is no supreme who is truly comparable to the First God Lord, and it will definitely not be able to compete with the Protoss and the Demon Race.

And their potential is almost exhausted, and there is no way to continue to improve, so they can only rely on their juniors.

"Okay, I agree to give His Highness Wanfa a place!"

The Infinite Supreme nodded helplessly.

Divine Blade Supreme, they also nodded their heads one by one.
